title: DeBounce Validation Result
description: Schema for the response returned by the DeBounce single email validation endpoint.

email.description: The email address that was validated

role.description: Whether the email is role-based (sales@, info@, webmaster@, etc.)

free_email.description: Whether the email is from a free email provider such as Gmail or Yahoo

result.description: The final validation result determining suitability for marketing emails

reason.description: The reason for the given result (e.g., Deliverable, Undeliverable, Catch-All, Disposable)

send_transactional.description: Whether sending transactional email is recommended (1=yes, 0=no)

did_you_mean.description: Suggested corrected email address when a typo is detected

photo.description: Profile photo URL (only present when photo=true query param is passed)

name.description: Full name associated with the email (only present when append=true)

success.description: Whether the API call succeeded (1) or not (0)

balance.description: Remaining credit balance on the account after this call
